payload.text:
Streakly — habit streaks, made simple. 🎯

Commands:
/start — Welcome + main menu
/help — This help message
/add — Add a new habit
/check — Log habits for today
/stats — Your streak stats

Tip: send /start any time to bring back the menu.

name: T03: unknown /command gets a friendly fallback with the main menu

payload.text:
I don't recognize that command.

Send /help to see what I can do, or tap a button below.

name: T03: a second unknown /command also gets the fallback

payload.text:
I don't recognize that command.

Send /help to see what I can do, or tap a button below.

name: T03: plain (non-command) text is left silent — user can use the menu or /help
